characters.appearance: Young adult, medium build, fair complexion. Brown hair styled in a messy half-bun. She wears round glasses with thin frames and large, ornate gold earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A colorful horizontally striped collared shirt featuring red, white, blue, green, and brown stripes.

characters.appearance: Adult, medium build, fair complexion. Short brown hair and light facial stubble.
characters.wardrobe: A red and blue plaid button-down shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hello everyone! आज मैं बात करूंगी कि मैंने अपना English speaking confidence कैसे बढ़ाया। [Hello everyone! Today I will talk about how I increased my English speaking confidence.]
Character A says: पहले जब मैं office में English बोलने की कोशिश करती थी, तो बहुत hesitation होती थी। [Earlier when I tried to speak English in the office, there was a lot of hesitation.]
Character A says: मुझे लगता था कि कोई मेरी गलतियां सुधारने वाला होना चाहिए, बिना मुझे judge किये। [I felt like there should be someone to correct my mistakes, without judging me.]
Character A says: फिर मुझे एक बहुत बढ़िया app मिला जो मेरी English सुनता है और real-time में mistakes correct करता है। [Then I found a great app that listens to my English and corrects mistakes in real-time.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a relatable pain point: lacking English confidence in professional settings.
- Establishes empathy by sharing a personal struggle with hesitation and the fear of being judged.
- Introduces the solution (the app) and its core value proposition of real-time, judgment-free correction.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
HELLO EVERYONE!
आज मैं बात करूंगी
कि मैंने अपना
ENGLISH SPEAKING
CONFIDENCE कैसे बढ़ाया।
पहले जब मैं OFFICE में
ENGLISH बोलने की
कोशिश करती थी,
तो बहुत HESITATION
होती थी।
मुझे लगता था कि कोई
मेरी गलतियां सुधारने
वाला होना चाहिए,
बिना मुझे JUDGE किये।
फिर मुझे एक बहुत बढ़िया
APP मिला जो मेरी
ENGLISH सुनता है
और REAL-TIME में
MISTAKES CORRECT
करता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इस app का नाम है Supernova. [The app is called Supernova.]
Character A says: For example, interview practice. [For example, interview practice.]
Character A says: "I am a quick learner." ["I am a quick learner."]
Character A says: App मुझे बताता है कि मेरी pronunciation और grammar कहाँ गलत है। [The app tells me where my pronunciation and grammar are wrong.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directly introduces the brand name, Supernova.
- Shifts the visual focus to the app interface to prove the product exists and works.
- Demonstrates a practical, real-world use case (interview practice) relevant to the target audience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
इस APP का नाम है
SUPERNOVA.
FOR EXAMPLE,
INTERVIEW PRACTICE.
"I AM A QUICK LEARNER."
APP मुझे बताता है
कि मेरी PRONUNCIATION
और GRAMMAR
कहाँ गलत है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बिल्कुल एक personal teacher की तरह! [Just like a personal teacher!]
Character A says: ये आपको तुरंत feedback देता है। [It gives you feedback immediately.]
Character A says: और आप daily lessons भी ले सकते हैं... [And you can also take daily lessons...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Re-engages the viewer with the presenter's face to build trust.
- Reinforces the AI tutor feature by comparing it to a personal teacher.
- Teases the next feature (daily lessons) to maintain viewer interest.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
बिल्कुल एक
PERSONAL TEACHER
की तरह!
ये आपको तुरंत
FEEDBACK देता है।
और आप
DAILY LESSONS
भी ले सकते हैं...

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Expert teachers के साथ, जो आपको real-world situations में बोलना सिखाते हैं। [With expert teachers, who teach you to speak in real-world situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the video lesson feature of the app.
- Highlights the practical application of the app by focusing on real-world speaking situations.
- Adds perceived value by mentioning expert teachers.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
EXPERT TEACHERS
के साथ, जो आपको
REAL-WORLD SITUATIONS
में बोलना सिखाते हैं।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अगर आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova try करें! [If you also want to speak English without fear, try Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call to action.
- Ties back to the emotional hook of speaking without fear.
- Prompts immediate app download without relying on specific free trial claims.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अगर आप भी
बिना डरे
ENGLISH बोलना चाहते हैं,
तो आज ही
SUPERNOVA TRY करें!
